nasb.text: He said, “I have not troubled Israel, but you and your father’s house have, because you have forsaken the commandments of the Lord and you have followed the Baals.

esv.text: And he answered, “I have not troubled Israel, but you have, and your father’s house, because you have abandoned the commandments of the Lord and followed the Baals.

cnv.text: 以利亞說：“給以色列惹麻煩的，不是我，而是你和你父的家；因為你們離棄了耶和華的誡命，又去隨從巴力。

ccb.text: 以利亚回答说：“给以色列带来灾祸的不是我，而是你和你父亲家，因为你们抛弃耶和华的诫命，去随从巴力。
